commands.purpose: request a new locked route from the configured bridge
select a provisional San d'Oria Rank 1-1 mission step and request a locked route from the local bridge
commands.side_effects: local tracked objective selection plus localhost route request; no movement, no targeting, no trading, no packet mutation, and no arrival claim

commands.purpose: autodetect a supported current mission step and request a locked guidance route from the local bridge
commands.side_effects: read-only player memory, read-only incoming mission packet state, local tracked objective selection, and localhost route request; no movement, no targeting, no trading, no packet mutation, and no arrival claim

commands.purpose: list, load, or inspect a verified live guide route such as the Northern San d'Oria to Port San d'Oria route
commands.side_effects: local route display state only plus local pilot frame evidence when the operator starts a pilot session; no movement, no targeting, no trading, no packet mutation, and no arrival claim

commands.purpose: start, inspect, or reset private-server route-test waypoint and zone progress evidence for a loaded live guide route
commands.side_effects: local JSONL write only while a pilot session is active; no movement, no targeting, no trading, no packet mutation, and no route-quality claim

commands.purpose: request the next eligible objective for guidance from the local bridge
commands.side_effects: local objective guidance only plus localhost objective request; no movement, no targeting, no trading, no packet mutation, and no arrival claim

commands.purpose: request mission, quest, and EXP guidance recommendations from the local bridge
commands.side_effects: local objective plan guidance only plus localhost objective plan request; no movement, no targeting, no trading, no packet mutation, and no arrival claim

commands.purpose: mark the current mission or quest complete in local OddQ guidance state
commands.side_effects: local guidance completion ledger write only; no movement, no targeting, no trading, no packet mutation, and no arrival claim

commands.purpose: remove the current mission or quest from local OddQ guidance completion state
commands.side_effects: local guidance completion ledger write only; no movement, no targeting, no trading, no packet mutation, and no arrival claim

commands.purpose: advance the displayed route segment for guidance
commands.side_effects: local display state only; no movement, no targeting, no trading, no packet mutation, and no arrival claim

commands.purpose: return to the prior displayed route segment for guidance
commands.side_effects: local display state only; no movement, no targeting, no trading, no packet mutation, and no arrival claim

commands.purpose: start, stop, annotate, and sample local live pilot evidence
commands.side_effects: local JSONL write only while a pilot session is active

commands.purpose: record repeated route-generation/transport evidence against the local bridge/backend
commands.side_effects: local JSONL write and localhost route requests only; no movement, no targeting, no trading, no packet mutation, and no manual route-quality proof
